items.headline: Do Rising Earnings Estimates Reframe Albemarle's (ALB) Lithium Strategy as Discipline or Cyclicality?
items.snippet: In recent weeks, Albemarle has attracted heightened attention as analysts lifted earnings estimates for the current quarter and fiscal years, ahead of its August 5, 2026 earnings release. This shift in expectations, reflected in a strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) and growing search int

items.headline: BofA Securities Adjusts Price Target on Albemarle to $155 From $225, Maintains Buy Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: RBC Cuts Price Target on Albemarle to $166 From $257, Keeps Outperform Rating
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $207.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

items.headline: Will ALB's Expansion Actions Power Stronger Sales Volumes?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation ALB is strategically executing its projects aimed at boosting its global lithium conversion capacity. ALB saw higher sales volumes (up 14% year over year) in its Energy Storage unit in the first quarter on the strength of its integrated conversion facilities

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Despite strong fundamental momentum, the stock has recently experienced short-term technical weakness, pulling back to the $140 range, while analysts' average price target is $214.65.
